name: Netcare Limited
summary: Netcare Limited, an investment holding company, provides healthcare services in South Africa and Lesotho. The company operates through Hospital and Emergency Services, and Primary Care segments. The Hospital and Emergency Services segment engages in the hospital and pharmacy operations. Its operations covers its private acute hospital network that includes day clinics; and non-acute services comprising emergency medical services, private mental health clinics operation, and cancer care services. The Primary Care segment offers comprehensive primary healthcare services, and employee health and wellness services, as well as administrative services to medical and dental practices. The company operates through a network of 54 hospitals; 5 public-private partnership hospitals; 10605 registered hospital beds; 10 cancer care centers; 422 theaters; 63 renal dialysis units with 860 dialysis stations; 95 primary healthcare centers; 15 medicross day theaters; 79 netcare 911 emergency sites; 7 netcare training campuses; and 12 mental health and psychiatric clinics with 841 beds. Netcare Limited was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Sandton, South Africa.
